headline: The 5 Smartphone Chip Stocks Poised for the Next Handset Upgrade Wave
summary: Silicon content per handset is quietly repricing as on-device AI and RF complexity collide with the next refresh cycle, and five chip names are already splitting into winners and losers before most investors notice the gap.
